text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In my performance class, they said<n>"Don't be
afraid of the audience. They're<n>like teammates
who will lift you up."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I understand that, I really do. I'm just nogood at being the center of attention...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If only they could turn the lights down<n>so low that
no one could see me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, sorry. Forget I said anything. I have<n>to
change!
